_description: A fact about a topic not covered by any vault → status gap

candidate.content: The Northwind Clinic campus cafeteria closes at 7pm on weekdays

expected_output.gap_note: Transient logistical fact about an external location. It does not describe the user's identity, skills, projects, fitness, learning, setup, active work, or notes. No configured vault owns it.

routing_rationale: The configured persona model should retain only durable context that improves future assistance. A cafeteria closing time fails that test, so the router emits a gap.
